name: solar-status
description: Terminal dashboard for solar activity in your city: NOAA storm scales, Kp index, aurora odds, tech impact, and how it may make you feel. Zero dependencies.

scripts.test: node --check bin/core.mjs && node --check bin/solar-status.mjs && node --check bin/solar-bot.mjs && node bin/solar-status.mjs --help

author: Vlad Arbatov <vlad@arbatov.dev>
